user_feedback: ok, I still have to press spacebar to intiate pulling the other birds after the first one was pulled, can you fix that
analysis:
- Issue identified: After launching the first bird, the player has to manually press spacebar to initiate aiming for the next bird. The aiming should automatically start when the previous bird settles and there are birds remaining.
- Files affected: game.js
- Changes needed: Add logic in the updateGameState function to automatically start aiming when active birds list becomes empty and there are birds remaining, ensuring seamless transition between bird launches.
